1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 category codes to identify agricultural code (candidate columns: arjordbr, artype)

3.description: select AR50 polygons with the chosen agricultural code (nationwide) to reduce set before spatial filter

4.description: reduce AR50 agricultural polygons to those intersecting Stavanger municipality geometry

5.description: select parcels (teig) inside Stavanger by kommunenummer

6.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons within Stavanger

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid (and kommunenummer) to deduplicate parcels

10.description: return teigid and kommunenummer for the selected parcels

FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

LIMIT 100;

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_Envelope((SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '1103')))
ORDER BY arjordbr
LIMIT 100;
